title: acosta resupinata subsp. degenii
intro: Acosta resupinata subsp. degenii, also known as Degen's Acosta, is a plant species within the Acosta genus, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including relieving coughs, colds, and fever, as well as soothing digestive issues such as diarrhea and stomach cramps. Acosta resupinata subsp. degenii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a convenient and natural way to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
